title: password_policy
description: The account-level password policy — one record per AWS account or IdP tenant. Singleton: each account/tenant emits exactly one record. Policies check minimum length, complexity, expiry, and reuse settings.

id.description: Account or tenant identifier — typically the account ID or org ID.

provider.description: Cloud provider or IdP short name: aws, okta, azure_ad.

max_age_days.description: Maximum password age in days before forced rotation. 0 = no expiry.

reuse_prevention_count.description: Number of previous passwords that cannot be reused. 0 = no restriction.

requires_uppercase.description: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

requires_lowercase.description: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

requires_numbers.description: Password must contain at least one digit.

requires_symbols.description: Password must contain at least one symbol/special character.

mfa_required.description: MFA is required at sign-on (IdP-level policy, not just a password attribute).
